
  [2;3m[37mUnless... the grep output was from a different directory or the file was actually in both locations? Or maybe I misread the grep output. Let me think about what's actually [0m
  [2;3m[37mhappening here by re-running the commands to verify.[0m

[1m[32m●[39m List all go files in src/dex[0m
  [37m$ find /workspace/tmp/r8_go/src/dex -name "*.go" | sort && echo "---TOTAL:" && find /workspace/tmp/r8_go/src/dex -name "*.go" | wc -l[39m
  [37m└ 73 lines...[39m

[2m[37m◐[0m [2;3m[37mI see - `src/dex/dex_call_site.go` exists but doesn't import `graph`. And I don't see `internal_options_bridge.go` or `marker.go` in the list![0m

  [2;3m[37mWait, where are `internal_options_bridge.go` and `marker.go`? They showed up in my earlier `ls src/dex/` output:[0m
  [2;3m[37m```[0m
  [2;3m[37mbinary_reader.go[0m
  [2;3m[37mclasses_checksum.go[0m
  [2;3m[37mcompat_byte_buffer.go[0m
  [2;3m[37m...[0m
  [2;3m[37minternal_options_bridge.go[0m
  [2;3m[37m...[0m
  [2;3m[37mmarker.go[0m
  [2;3m[37m...[0m
  [2;3m[37m```[0m

  [2;3m[37mBut now they're not in the `find` output! Either:[0m


  [2;3m[37m1. They were deleted somehow[0m
  [2;3m[37m2. They were never in `src/dex/` and I misread the earlier `ls` output[0m

  [2;3m[37mLet me double-check by listing the directory again and specifically looking for those two files.[0m

[1m[32m●[39m Check for marker and internal files in dex
[0m  [37m$ ls /workspace/tmp/r8_go/src/dex/marker* /workspace/tmp/r8_go/src/dex/internal* 2>&1[39m
  [37m└ 3 lines...[39m

[1m[32m●[39m Find marker.go and internal_options_bridge.go[0m
  [37m$ find /workspace/tmp/r8_go -name "marker.go" -o -name "internal_options_bridge.go" 2>/dev/null[39m
  [37m└ 4 lines...[39m

[2m[37m◐[0m [2;3m[37m`marker.go` and `internal_options_bridge.go` are in `src/graph/`, NOT in `src/dex/`! And `classes_checksum.go` is also in `src/graph/`. My earlier grep output was wrong - I [0m
  [2;3m[37mwas reading the grep output incorrectly.[0m

  [2;3m[37mLet me go back and understand the original issue. Looking at the first `go build ./...` error after cleaning cache:[0m
  [2;3m[37m```[0m
  [2;3m[37mpackage github.com/dh-kam/r8-go/src/dex[0m
  [2;3m[37m    imports github.com/dh-kam/r8-go/src/graph from classes_checksum.go[0m


  [2;3m[37m```[0m

  [2;3m[37mThis error is saying:[0m
  [2;3m[37m1. `src/dex` package imports `src/graph` - from `classes_checksum.go` (but the file is in `src/graph/classes_checksum.go`, not `src/dex/classes_checksum.go`)[0m
  [2;3m[37m2. `src/graph` imports `src/dex` - from `app_view.go`[0m

  [2;3m[37mSo there's a circular dependency where `src/dex` imports `src/graph` and `src/graph` imports `src/dex` back. I need to find which file in `src/dex` is actually importing [0m
  [2;3m[37m`src/graph` to understand where this cycle originates.[0m

  [2;3m[37m```[0m

[1m[32m●[39m Find remaining dex production files importing graph[0m
  [37m$ find /workspace/tmp/r8_go/src/dex -name "*.go" | grep -v "_test.go" | xargs grep -l '"github.com/dh-kam/r8-go/src/graph"' 2>/dev/null[39m
  [37m└ 2 lines...[39m

[1m[32m●[39m Check dex_call_site.go imports and graph usage[0m
  [37m$ grep -n "import\|graph\." /workspace/tmp/r8_go/src/dex/dex_call_site.go | head -20[39m
  [37m└ 11 lines...[39m

[2m[37m◐[0m [2;3m[37mWait, `dex_call_site.go` uses `graph.DexString`, `graph.DexProto`, `graph.DexValue` BUT the `import` only has `"fmt"`. The `graph` package is not imported! The file is [0m
  [2;3m[37mbroken.[0m

  [2;3m[37mBut earlier my grep showed:[0m
  [2;3m[37m```src/dex/dex_call_site.go:7:19: undefined: DexString[0m
  [2;3m[37m```That was from the build failure - `DexString` is referenced as just `DexString` (no package qualifier). But now looking at the file, it references `graph.DexString` WITH [0m
  [2;3m[37mthe `graph.` prefix.[0m


  [2;3m[37mThis is contradictory. Let me check the actual file again - looking at the cat output, the struct definition clearly uses `graph.DexString`, `graph.DexProto`, and [0m
  [2;3m[37m`graph.DexValue`, but the imports section only has `"fmt"` with no `graph` import, which would definitely cause an undefined error.[0m

  [2;3m[37mThe build error message says `dex_call_site.go:7:19: undefined: DexString`, which is strange because if the file actually uses `graph.DexString`, the error should reference [0m
  [2;3m[37mthat qualified name. This inconsistency suggests the file content might have changed, or I'm looking at a different version than what was actually compiled.[0m

[1m[32m●[39m Check exact content of dex_call_site.go[0m
  [37m$ head -15 /workspace/tmp/r8_go/src/dex/dex_call_site.go[39m
  [37m└ 2 lines...[39m

[1m[32m●[39m Find dex_call_site.go[0m
  [37m$ find /workspace/tmp/r8_go -name "dex_call_site.go" 2>/dev/null[39m
  [37m└ 2 lines...[39m

[2m[37m◐[0m [2;3m[37mAll these files are actually in `src/graph/`, not `src/dex/`! My earlier `ls src/dex/` output was wrong or I misread it. [0m

  [2;3m[37mSo the actual source of the cycle is different. Let me do a fresh analysis. The build error says:[0m
  [2;3m[37m```[0m
  [2;3m[37mpackage github.com/dh-kam/r8-go/src/dex    imports github.com/dh-kam/r8-go/src/graph from classes_checksum.go[0m
  [2;3m[37m```[0m

  [2;3m[37mBut `classes_checksum.go` is in `src/graph/`, not `src/dex/`. This error message doesn't mean the file is in `src/dex/`. [0m

  [2;3m[37mThe error is telling me that `src/dex` has a file importing `src/graph`, and the cycle detection traced through `classes_checksum.go` to find it. Looking at the full error [0m
  [2;3m[37moutput, I can see the chain: the root package imports `cmd`, which imports something that eventually creates the cycle back to `src/dex` or `src/graph`. I'm tracing through [0m
  [2;3m[37mthe import cycle step by step—starting from main importing cmd, then following the chain through native_pipeline, writerintegration, covariantreturntype, and [0m
  [2;3m[37mclass_synthesizer until it loops back when dex/classes_checksum imports graph. The issue is that classes_checksum actually exists in the dex directory, not where the find [0m
  [2;3m[37mcommand initially suggested, which is creating this circular dependency.[0m

[1m[32m●[39m Find ALL instances of the files[0m
  [37m$ find /workspace/tmp/r8_go -name "classes_checksum.go" && echo "---" && find /workspace/tmp/r8_go -name "dex_call_site.go"[39m
  [37m└ 4 lines...[39m

[1m[32m●[39m Check dex package build and remaining graph imports[0m
  [37m$ cd /workspace/tmp/r8_go && go build ./src/dex/... 2>&1; echo "---" && grep -rn '"github.com/dh-kam/r8-go/src/graph"' src/dex/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v "_test.go"[39m
  [37m└ 2 lines...[39m

[2m[37m◐[0m [2;3m[37mBoth commands returned empty. The `go build ./src/dex/...` returned exit code 1 with no output, and the grep returned no results (exit code 1 means no matches found).[0m

  [2;3m[37mLet me try `go build ./src/dex/...` in verbose mode to understand what's happening.[0m

  [2;3m[37mActually, wait - the exit code is 1 but there's no output? That's strange. Let me run again with explicit output:[0m

[1m[32m●[39m Check dex build with explicit status[0m
  [37m$ cd /workspace/tmp/r8_go && go build ./src/dex/... 2>&1; echo "BUILD_EXIT:$?"[39m
  [37m└ 2 lines...[39m

[1m[32m●[39m Full build check[0m
  [37m$ cd /workspace/tmp/r8_go && go build ./... 2>&1; echo "BUILD_EXIT:$?"[39m
  [37m└ 14 lines...[39m

[2m[37m◐[0m [2;3m[37mNow I can see the actual problems more clearly:1. `src/graph/field_signature.go` - uses `GraphDexField` but it's undefined[0m
  [2;3m[37m2. `src/graph/marker.go:384,406` - uses `graph.` (unqualified self-reference in the graph package)[0m
  [2;3m[37m3. `src/graph/classes_checksum.go` - has the half-edited code I made earlier! The `TryParseAndAppend` I edited is now using `mutf8BytesToString` which doesn't exist.[0m

  [2;3m[37mThe issues in `classes_checksum.go` are from my editing - I changed the `TryParseAndAppend` function but introduced bugs. [0m

  [2;3m[37mI need to correct my earlier analysis - `marker.go` is actually in `src/graph/`, not `src/dex/`, which means those invalid `graph.` references are self-references within the [0m
  [2;3m[37msame package. Let me look at what `classes_checksum.go` currently contains to understand the scope of the damage from my edits.[0m

[1m[32m●[39m Check current state of classes_checksum.go
[0m  [37m$ cat /workspace/tmp/r8_go/src/graph/classes_checksum.go | head -120[39m
  [37m└ 121 lines...[39m

[1m[32m●[39m Check marker.go graph references[0m
  [37m$ grep -n "graph\." /workspace/tmp/r8_go/src/graph/marker.go | head -10[39m
  [37m└ 3 lines...[39m

[2m[37m◐[0m [2;3m[37mI see now! The issue is:[0m

  [2;3m[37m1. `src/graph/classes_checksum.go` - My earlier edit replaced the `TryParseAndAppend` body but accidentally broke `DefinitelyPrecedesChecksumMarker`. I need to restore it [0m
  [2;3m[37mproperly. The file is in `src/graph/` not `src/dex/` - so it CAN use `DexString` directly without package qualifier.[0m

  [2;3m[37m2. `src/graph/marker.go:384,406` - uses `graph.DexItemFactory` and `graph.DexString` with package qualifier, but this file IS in the `graph` package. [0m

  [2;3m[37mSince these files are already in the `graph` package, I shouldn't be using the `graph.` prefix on `DexItemFactory` and `DexString`. I also need to fix `classes_checksum.go` [0m
  [2;3m[37mwhere `DefinitelyPrecedesChecksumMarker` got partially edited and broke - I need to restore it to use `decodePrefixFromMutf8` properly, and fix `TryParseAndAppend` which [0m
  [2;3m[37mshould take `*DexString` instead of `[]byte`. I see the real issue now - I mistakenly edited files in `src/graph/` when the actual problem was import cycles from `src/dex/` [0m
  [2;3m[37mimporting `src/graph/`. Since `src/graph/` files are in the same package, they can use `DexString` directly without issues. I need to revert my changes to [0m
  [2;3m[37m`classes_checksum.go`, fix the `graph.` prefixes in `marker.go`, and investigate the `GraphDexField` undefined error in `field_signature.go`.[0m

[35m●[39m [36msrc/graph/classes_checksum.go[97m가 잘못 편집되었습니다. 원래 [36m*DexString[97m 파라미터로 복원하고, [36mmarker.go[97m의 [36mgraph.[97m 자기참조 오류도 수정합니다.[39m

[1m[32m●[39m Check GraphDexField and retrace parser issues[0m
  [37m$ grep -n "GraphDexField" /workspace/tmp/r8_go/src/graph/field_signature.go | head -5 && echo "---" && head -5 /workspace/tmp/r8_go/src/retrace/default_parser.go[39m
  [37m└ 7 lines...[39m

[1m[32m●[39m Find GraphDexField usage[0m
  [37m$ grep -n "GraphDexField" /workspace/tmp/r8_go/src/graph/field_signature.go[39m
  [37m└ 1 line...[39m

[1m[32m●[39m Build just graph package to see current errors[0m
  [37m$ cd /workspace/tmp/r8_go && go build ./src/graph/... 2>&1[39m
  [37m└ 13 lines...[39m

[35m●[39m [36mclasses_checksum.go[97m의 내 편집을 원래 상태로 완전히 복원합니다.[39m

[35m∙ Deep architecture analysis[39m [37m(Esc to cancel · 82 B)[39m

  진행률을 점검하고 미진한 부분, 누락된 작업, 남은 리스크를 리스트업한 뒤 우선순위 높은 것부터 진행해보자.
  clean architecture, single responsibility principle, interface-oriented programming 관점에서 구조를 분석하고 어긋난 부분을 개선하자.
